author: Nintendo Everything
text:
The Legend of Kage is this week’s Console Archives on Nintendo Switch 2

Hamster just confirmed its latest Console Archives game for Nintendo Switch 2, which is The Legend of Kage. It arrives tomorrow, June 18. Taito initially dropped The Legend of Kage in 1986. The 8-bit action game has players entering the demon realm to rescue Kirihime, who’s been kidnapped. Here’s some additional information: The Legend of Kage was released by Taito...

The post The Legend of Kage is this week’s Console Archives on Nintendo Switch 2 appeared first on Nintendo Everything.

author: Nintendo Everything
text:
EA Sports FC 26 is Europe’s next Nintendo Switch Online Game Trial on Switch 2, Switch

Nintendo announced its latest Switch Online Game Trial in Europe today, which is for EA Sports FC 26. The offer is planned for both Nintendo Switch 2 and Switch starting tomorrow, lasting until June 24. During the event, the game will be fully playable at no extra cost for those who have an active membership. Everything is accessible and progress...

The post EA Sports FC 26 is Europe’s next Nintendo Switch Online Game Trial on Switch 2, Switch appeared first on Nintendo Everything.

author: Nintendo Everything
text:
Pokemon Champions 1.1.0 update out now, patch notes

Pokemon Champions has received its latest update, and the game is now at version 1.1.0. If you’ve been keeping up with news about the game, you know that today marks the start of Regulation Set M-B. As part of this, the latest set of Pokemon have been added to the game. The title also has its official mobile launch today....

The post Pokemon Champions 1.1.0 update out now, patch notes appeared first on Nintendo Everything.

author: Nintendo Everything
text:
G-Mode Archives+ Pac-Man announced for Nintendo Switch [update: release date, trailer]

May 21: Today, it was announced that Pac-Man will be releasing as part of the G-Mode Archives+ line. It’s coming to Nintendo Switch in the future – a release date wasn’t provided, but will be shared soon. Similar to other G-Mode Archives titles, this is intended to replicate the version previously released for Japanese flip phones. Still, it will retain...

The post G-Mode Archives+ Pac-Man announced for Nintendo Switch [update: release date, trailer] appeared first on Nintendo Everything.

author: Nintendo Everything
text:
Whisper of the House to appear on Nintendo Switch today

As revealed by a Nintendo eShop listing, GD Studio is about to put Whisper of the House on Nintendo Switch. The game will be available later today as a digital download. Whisper of the House, which has been released elsewhere and has a positive player reception, is all about organizing and decorating. Townspeople will give you different tasks, including helping...

text:
Final Fantasy Tactics: The Ivalice Chronicles 1.5.0 update out today, patch notes – New Game+ and more

Square Enix announced a new update for Final Fantasy Tactics: The Ivalice Chronicles, which brings the game to version 1.5.0. It arrives today on Nintendo Switch 2 and Switch. The update for Final Fantasy Tactics: The Ivalice Chronicles features New Game+ and a Zodiac Compatibility function. Several new options have been added to the game as well. Here’s a look...

author: Nintendo Everything
text:
My Little Puppy will have a Nintendo Switch physical release in Asia with English support, pre-orders open

My Little Puppy saw a digital-only launch on Nintendo Switch when it debuted a couple of weeks ago, but a physical release has now been revealed for Asia. Fans can choose between a standard copy and a deluxe edition. With the latter, you’ll get a double sided photo card, handkerchief, mini stickers, a plush corgi charm, an art book, and...

The post My Little Puppy will have a Nintendo Switch physical release in Asia with English support, pre-orders open appeared first on Nintendo Everything.

author: Nintendo Everything
text:
Solarpunk launch trailer – Nintendo Switch 2 gets peaceful survival adventure game

To celebrate the launch of Solarpunk, Rokaplay and Cyberwave readied a launch trailer. We saw the peaceful survival adventure title on Nintendo Switch this week. Here’s an overview with more details about the game: Set high above the clouds in a vibrant world of floating islands, Solarpunk invites players to build a peaceful life powered entirely by renewable energy. From...

The post Solarpunk launch trailer – Nintendo Switch 2 gets peaceful survival adventure game appeared first on Nintendo Everything.

author: Nintendo Everything
text:
Nintendo issues statement about recent data breach

Nintendo issued an official statement following reports yesterday that the company was impacted by a data breach. For those that missed the news, SHADOWBYT3$ said it obtained 859MB of Nintendo employee data through TinyPulse. Employee names, bank statements, employee IDs and reports, analytics, and more were said to be affected. With today’s statement, Nintendo confirms that a breach took place....

The post Nintendo issues statement about recent data breach appeared first on Nintendo Everything.

text:
List of all Nintendo Switch demos

Thousands of games are currently available on Nintendo Switch, and there are a ton of demos out there for many of them. Not just Nintendo, but also third-parties are offering demos. We’ve now put together a comprehensive list of what’s out there. Since our reader base is English-speaking, that’s what we’re focusing on here. In other words, we’re highlighting Switch...
